meta.title: Basic info
meta.idHint: Use the format authorName.packageName. Only letters, numbers, and the symbols . - _ are allowed.
meta.name: Package name
meta.author: Author
meta.originalAuthorPlaceholder: Enter this when there is an original version
meta.repoUrlPlaceholder: A URL that explains the package
meta.packageRoleHint: Select "Support package" for packages that do not add features to AviUtl2 itself and are only required for other packages to work.
meta.deprecationHint: If you want to mark this package as deprecated, explain the reason and any replacement package here.
meta.deprecationPlaceholder: Enter a replacement package or migration target if available

packageType.placeholder: Enter a type or choose from the list
packageType.helper: You can choose from the list. If the type is missing, you can enter it manually.

tags.helper: You can choose from existing tags. If a tag is missing, you can enter it manually.

description.externalRawHint: When linking Markdown from GitHub, use a URL that starts with https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.
description.bodyPlaceholder: Enter package details. Markdown is supported. It helps to describe where it appears in the UI, how to access it, and how to use it. External images can also be embedded.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.body: Optional. When set, users can check the update details in the Update Center and detail screen.
changelog.formatBody:
For each version, create a `## VersionName Date(YYYY-MM-DD)` heading, and make sure the version name matches the version history above.
Inside each version section, headings from `###` onward may be used.
We recommend writing changes as bullet points.

Example:
changelog.formatExample:
# 更新履歴

## 2.0.0 2025-07-07
### New features
- Added feature 1
- Added feature 2

### Fixes
- Fix 1

noticeMarkdown.title: Notice
noticeMarkdown.body: Optional. Enter notes that should be shown to users during download.

relations.title: Related packages
relations.description: All fields are optional. Enter multiple package IDs separated by commas.

license.title: License
license.name: License name
license.nameHint: For a custom license, enter "Custom License".
license.templateHint: Using a template. Enter the copyright year and holder.
license.previewHint: The preview appears after you enter the type and copyright holder.

images.title: Images
images.thumbnailDescription: Shown in the package list (1 image)
images.thumbnailHint:
Recommended: 1:1 aspect ratio (around 206×206px)
Please add one if possible to keep the list readable.
images.infoDescription: Shown on the package details page (multiple allowed)
